summary: PR #2503 improved matching in src/melee/lb/lbcollision by matching lbColl_80005C44 and lbColl_80009DD4, improving several nearby collision/debug-draw helpers, fixing lbColl_80006E58 argument ordering so distance is written through the explicit output parameter, and updating lbcollision.h prototypes. The bot report records two new matches and seven unmatched-item improvements; the PR body explicitly records remaining stack/FPR and Vec3 temporary-layout drift.

key_files.role: Main implementation changes: matching and cleanup for lb collision functions, prototype/signature adjustment for lbColl_80006E58, Vec3 temporary reshaping, PAD_STACK changes, nearzero helper changes, added debug draw colors, and local JObj matrix helper.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c added 243 deleted 219 hunks 46
raw_diff: lbcollision.c prototype for lbColl_80006E58 moves float* arg8 after scl/arg10/arg11
raw_diff: lbColl_80005C44 changes d2 Vec3 temporary into d2_x/d2_y/d2_z scalar locals and uses nearzero
raw_diff: lbColl_80006094 PAD_STACK 64 to 56 and Vec3 copy initialization changes
raw_diff: lbColl_800067F8 PAD_STACK 16 to 24 and Vec3 copy initialization changes
raw_diff: lbColl_80006E58 replaces scalar sp11C/sp120/sp124 and sp110/sp114/sp118 sets with Vec3 sp11C/sp110/sp104

decomp_lessons.lesson: For collision math functions, Vec3 temporary layout can be decisive: switching between whole-Vec3 copies and scalar component locals changed matching quality, but the PR also records that related by-value Vec3 layout mismatch remained unresolved in nearby helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Vec3 and scalar temporary rewrites across lbcollision.c
PR body Remaining work: by-value Vec3 temporary layout mismatch

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering a function signature, verify output-parameter placement at call and prototype surfaces; in this PR, moving lbColl_80006E58's float* arg8 after scalar parameters is tied to fixing distance output behavior and required header/prototype updates.
evidence_refs: PR body: fix lbColl_80006E58 so collision distance is written through explicit output parameter
raw_diff: lbColl_80006E58 declaration/definition reorder float* arg8
PR body: update stale lbcollision.h prototypes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Record remaining drift explicitly when a PR improves but does not match functions; here stack/FPR drift, sqrt spill/register difference, and Vec3 layout mismatch are named as unresolved blockers.
evidence_refs: PR body Remaining work

raw_diff: lbColl_800067F8 PAD_STACK(16) to PAD_STACK(24)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Global standards require verifier evidence for PAD_STACK; the PR includes build/pre-commit and bot percentage evidence, but no inline objdiff trace in the loaded slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use volatile loads from named float/double data symbols to influence constant-load shape in nearzero and clamp comparisons.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: nearzero uses *(volatile const float*) &lbColl_804D79F0 and lbColl_804D79F4
raw_diff: lbColl_80005C44 scale clamps use volatile const f64/float pointers
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is a matching tactic visible in the diff, not an accepted style recommendation; current standards caution against data/literal churn without ownership evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace helper calls or generated-looking repeated component assignments with local inlined tests and whole-Vec3 copies when that improves shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbColl_80006094 replaces testPlusX/testMinusX calls with local x computations
raw_diff: Vec3 vec4 = *arg0, arg4_offset = vec4, Vec3 vec2 = *arg2
raw_diff: lbColl_800067F8 replaces component-wise copies with Vec3 a0 = *a and Vec3 c0 = *c
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR body says some related structural drift remains, so this should be treated as a local matching observation rather than a universal rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a local JObj matrix accessor inline carrying jobj.h assert filename/line evidence before HSD_JObjSetupMatrix and jobj->mtx access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr with __assert('jobj.h', 1144, 'jobj'), HSD_JObjSetupMatrix(jobj), return jobj->mtx
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded global standards prefer canonical header inline/helper forms when identifiable; this PR evidence only shows the local inline addition, not a reviewed global policy.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Vec3 temporary layout can control lbcollision matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2503, lbcollision matching improved through changes between whole-Vec3 copies and scalar component locals, while the author explicitly recorded remaining by-value Vec3 temporary layout mismatch in nearby helpers. Curate as a local lbcollision lesson, not a global Vec3 rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Vec3/scalar temporary rewrites
PR body Remaining work: by-value Vec3 temporary layout mismatch

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify treatment of local header-inline reconstructions with assert filename/line evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2503 adds a local lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr inline with jobj.h assert filename/line evidence, HSD_JObjSetupMatrix, and direct jobj->mtx return. Current standards prefer canonical HSD_JObj helper/header inline forms when identifiable. Curator may want to use this PR as an example of a review-risk pattern: local inline reconstructions should be checked against owning HSD/JObj APIs before being treated as final cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr with __assert(lbColl_804D3700, 1144, lbColl_804D3708)
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence shows the tactic, while loaded standards already caution against manually expanding header helpers; curator review can decide whether this historical PR should become an example or warning.
